overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a player walking through a rain-soaked, neon-lit dystopian city at night. The scene features heavy acid rain, yellow-green atmospheric haze, towering skyscrapers including the Arasaka tower, and futuristic urban architecture with holographic billboards and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop with utility equipment and metal fencing

agents.ego_description: walking across a wet rooftop past red utility containers toward a corner with large digital billboards

entered.detail: large red industrial containers with metal railings on top
tall metal security fencing with horizontal bars
large curved digital billboard displaying MIX IT UP advertisement with female figure
rounded building facade with yellow trim and multiple advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked rooftop with red utility structures and metal fencing. The player walks forward through heavy rain toward a corner where a large curved digital billboard displays advertisements, with a yellow building facade visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian passage under overpass with metal shutters

events.description: turns left into covered walkway beneath an overhead bridge structure
enters darker corridor with metal shutters and artificial ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through a covered passage with metal shutters and stairs, transitioning from open rooftop to enclosed corridor

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge spanning across the passage above
corrugated metal security shutters on building facades
building with green neon accent lighting around the entrance

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into a covered passage beneath an overhead walkway, entering a darker corridor with metal shutter doors. The environment shifts from open and rainy to enclosed and sheltered with artificial lighting, emerging toward a street with a green-lit building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with towering skyscrapers and street vendors

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive Arasaka tower skyscraper
camera returns to horizontal and approaches a neon-lit food cart

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the massive Arasaka tower before continuing past parked vehicles and a food vendor cart

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the food cart on the right side of the path

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with ARASAKA signage disappearing into the yellow haze above
street vendor cart with bright yellow neon lighting and umbrella
futuristic vehicles parked along the side of the plaza
tall towers with multiple advertisement screens showing various products

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor into an open plaza, the player looks up at the imposing Arasaka tower rising into the haze. The scene features a food cart with yellow neon lighting, parked futuristic cars, and digital billboards, with sparse pedestrian activity in the rain-soaked environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with neon strip lighting

events.description: futuristic vehicle with red underglow drives past on the road
passes pedestrians on the sidewalk while continuing forward along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a busy road with red neon lighting, passing other pedestrians and observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road with glowing red undercarriage lighting

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead
metal safety railing separating the sidewalk from the road
tall modern street lamps with blue-white illumination

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sidewalk beside a multi-lane road illuminated by red neon strips, with an overpass structure visible ahead. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the road while the player encounters opposing pedestrians, passing street lamps and graffiti-covered walls in the rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-drenched rooftop into the depths of a neon-lit dystopian city center. It begins on an open rooftop amidst red utility structures and heavy rain, moving toward a large curved digital billboard and a yellow building facade. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts from the open storm into a sheltered, dark corridor beneath an overhead walkway, passing metal shutter doors before emerging toward a green-lit building. The scene then expands into an open plaza where the camera looks up at the imposing Arasaka tower rising into the haze, passing a yellow-neon food cart and parked futuristic cars. Finally, the movement continues along a sidewalk beside a road illuminated by red neon strips, passing graffiti-covered walls and oncoming pedestrians beneath a looming overpass.
